headline: OCP (Open Compute Project) Rack Market Forecast Report 2025-2026 & 2030 - Opportunities in Pre-Configured AI Rack Systems Among Hyperscale and Neocloud Operators and Liquid Cooling Integration
summary: The OCP rack market is set to grow from USD 1.68 billion in 2025 to USD 4.32 billion by 2030, driven by a 21.0% CAGR, as edge computing and high-performance computing demand increases. OCP racks, featuring modular designs and efficient power distribution, cater to compact, space-efficient deployments required by edge facilities. headline: Liqid Appoints Veteran Technology Executive John Byrne to Board of Directors
summary: WESTMINSTER, Colo., May 18, 2026--Liqid® (www.liqid.com), the global leader in software-defined memory and GPU pooling infrastructure, today announced the appointment of John Byrne to its Board of Directors. Byrne joins Liqid with more than three decades of building and scaling industry-leading sales, channel, and partner organizations at Dell Technologies, Dell EMC, and AMD.
